word: H5489 - סוּף - Çûwph - soof - Red Sea

sections.paragraph:
Original: סוּף

Transliteration: sûph

Phonetic: soof

BDB Definition:

Suph = "sea weed"
  1. a place opposite the site of the giving of the Deuteronomic law

Origin: for H5488 (by ellipsis of H3220)

TWOT entry: 1479

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
